rows.TWzh: 真是的，該適可而止了吧～

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>唉……我是想开动<Color=red>矿车<Color=white>，
可负责安全检查的人那副模样……
那种岩石是叫<Color=red>可口岩<Color=white>吧？

自从<Color=red>阿沅社长<Color=white>下令开采以来，
大家就都变得不太对劲了。
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我们不吃岩石，倒还无所谓。
那可口岩……恐怕不是好东西啊。

大家就開始變得有點不太對勁。

<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>オイラ<Ruby={2:4}たち>達は <Ruby={2:2}く>食わねぇからいいけどさ<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>Ugh... Even if I wanted to move the <Color=red>cart<Color=white>...
it won't be happening with the safety
officer so preoccupied.
You heard of this stuff called <Color=red>marbled
rock roast<Color=white>?

Ever since <Color=red>President Yunobo <Color=white>started
mining it, everyone's been too busy
with it to care about work.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>I haven't touched it, so I'm doing fine.
I get the sense that stuff's just not great
for ya.
